title: GitHub Copilot
copyText:
## Editorial notes

GitHub Copilot is useful for teams that want AI assistance tied directly to repository hosting, pull requests, and editor workflows.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# GitHub Copilot
AI developer assistant across GitHub, editors, pull requests, chat, code review, and agentic coding workflows.
